summary: LUCCCA Enterprise Framework Iteration 4 - Comprehensive testing of Phase A (sidebar panelMode), Phase B (Table Ordering, Mobile Ordering, Invoice Pipeline), and Phase C (Device Enrollment). All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Table Ordering with 30 tables, zone filters, order creation flow; Mobile Ordering with cart functionality; Device Enrollment with QR generation. Sidebar panelMode positioning confirmed as relative (not fixed).

minor.issue: Menu items return $0.00 prices - likely seed data issue, not API bug

ui_bugs.issue: Cart total shows '$NaN' when items have $0.00 price

action_items: OPTIONAL: Seed menu items with actual prices to fix $0.00 display and $NaN cart total
critical_code_review_comments: All Phase A, B, C features implemented correctly
Sidebar panelMode working - position: relative inside floating panels
Table Ordering: 29+ tables seeded with 5 zones (Bar, Main Dining, Patio, Private, VIP)
Order creation, item addition, status updates, and table freeing all working
Mobile Ordering: Menu display, cart functionality, order submission working
Invoice-to-Inventory pipeline: Item matching, transaction creation, stock updates working
Device Enrollment: Token generation, retrieval, activation, listing all working
QR code generation and display working in SystemSettings
seed_data_creation: Test orders created during testing, enrollment tokens generated
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 fully tested. Backend: All ordering APIs working (tables, orders, menu, invoice-to-inventory, stats). Device enrollment APIs working (generate, get, activate, list). Frontend: Table Ordering shows 30 tables with zone filters, order panel with menu search, status workflow. Mobile Ordering shows menu items with cart. Device Enrollment in SystemSettings generates QR codes. Sidebar uses panelMode=true with relative positioning. Minor issue: menu items have $0.00 prices causing $NaN in cart total.

table_ordering.create_order: PASS - creates order, links to table, calculates totals
table_ordering.close_order_frees_table: PASS - table status changes to cleaning

invoice_pipeline.invoice_to_inventory: PASS - processes items, creates transactions, updates stock

ordering_stats.get_stats: PASS - returns table and order statistics

table_ordering_section.stats_bar: PASS - shows occupied/total, in progress, revenue, orders
table_ordering_section.zone_filters: PASS - All, Bar, Main Dining, Patio, Private, VIP
table_ordering_section.order_panel: PASS - shows table info, order status, items

mobile_ordering_section.category_filters: PASS - All Items, Appetizer, Dessert, Entree

mocked_apis_list: /api/tts/speak - Returns audio: null, message: TTS not configured
